svg.aria-label: Highlighted assumption note for ex-US sales factor
svg.text: Ex-US sales factor vs US: explicit model assumption
Saved model-assumption note. This input is not claimed as a sourced external benchmark.
Ex-US sales = US sales x 0.667 volume factor x 0.50 price index x uptake.
Use in model: simple global gross-up before country-level price, access, and launch sequencing are modeled.
The card labels this as an explicit model assumption, so readers should vary it in sensitivity analysis.
No external source is used for this assumption.
